title: NON-EMERGENCY MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION - 211info
text: GILLIAM COUNTY TRANSPORTATION NON-EMERGENCY MEDICAL TRANSPORTATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides non-emergency medical transportation (NEMT) services to VA facilities, non-VA health and behavioral health appointments, pharmacies, and other health-related services. 221 S Oregon Street Condon, OR 97823 Eligibility: Veterans Hours: Varies by service (541) 351-9545 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 351-9545 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Gilliam County Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Veterans If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GILLIAM COUNTY TRANSPORTATION
